title: 500ml - Expanding Foam Filler | Weatherproof - Ideal for Pipes, Windows, Doors (for Internal & External Use) 500ml
features: Buy with confidence from a recognised Amazon Seller
description: Product Description The Original Gorilla Filler, is a ready to use foam filler, quickly and easily squeeze into gaps for a secure seal. Adheres to all common building materials. Ideal for filling gaps around window and door frames internal or external. Weatherproof, suitable around exterior pipes, brickwork and other cavaties. The Original Gorilla Filler, controllable hand held foam aerosol dispenser, accurate trigger control. Fill cavaties and gaps quickly and easily. Provides insulation against heat, sound and moisture. Ready to use 500ml Aerosol Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, The Old School House, 39 Bengal Street, Manchester, M4 6AF, UK. 151 Products (Ireland), Block 3, Harcourt Centre, Harcourt Road, Dublin 2, D02 A339, Ireland.
